line_preview: quietly: twoway__histogram_gen t_stat_sm if t_stat_sm<`max' & t_stat_sm>0.0 & `1'==1, start(0) width(`width') gen(obs_`a' x)
quietly: kdensity t_stat_sm if t_stat_sm<`max' & t_stat_sm>0.0 & `1'==1, width(`precision') gen(d_obs_`a') at(x)
* Note: argument is subsample variable in string format, typpically D_SOMETHING
foreach var of varlist D_all D_datacodesavail D_datacodesavailNo D_dataother D_dataotherNo D_editorbefore D_editorbeforeNo D_eye D_eyeNo D_macro D_micro ///
D_main D_mainNo D_model D_modelNo D_negNo D_negYes D_phdageOld D_phdageYoung D_ras D_rasNo D_single D_singleNo D_tenured3 D_tenured3No D_thanksHigh D_thanksLow{
* Export main sample with raw values and excluding numbers reported with low precision (only 1 non-zero digit)
twoway__histogram_gen t_stat_raw if t_stat_raw<`max' & t_stat_raw>0.0 , start(0) width(`width') gen(obs_raw x)
kdensity t_stat_raw if t_stat_raw<`max' & t_stat_raw>0.0, width(`precision') gen(d_obs_raw) at(x)
twoway__histogram_gen t_stat_raw if t_stat_raw<`max' & t_stat_raw>0.0 , start(0) width(`width') gen(obs_rawprecis x)
kdensity t_stat_raw if t_stat_raw<`max' & t_stat_raw>0.0, width(`precision') gen(d_obs_rawprecis) at(x)
* Export main sample weighted by table and article
twoway__histogram_gen t_stat_sm [fweight=weight_table_round] if t_stat_sm<`max' & t_stat_sm>0.0 , start(0) width(`width') gen(obs_wtable x)
kdensity t_stat_sm  [fweight=weight_table_round] if t_stat_sm<`max' & t_stat_sm>0.0, width(`precision') gen(d_obs_wtable) at(x)
twoway__histogram_gen t_stat_sm  [fweight=weight_article_round] if t_stat_sm<`max' & t_stat_sm>0.0, start(0) width(`width') gen(obs_wart x)
kdensity t_stat_sm [fweight=weight_article_round] if t_stat_sm<`max' & t_stat_sm>0.0, width(`precision') gen(d_obs_wart) at(x)
